output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? 5 Moves to Get Every Dollar Back
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your deposit? Know your rights, fight wrongful deductions, and send a demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99.
content_outline: The Frustrated Tenant's Dilemma: Why Landlords Withhold Security Deposits and What the Law Says
What Can a Landlord Legally Deduct? Spotting Bogus Cleaning and Damage Charges
Countdown to Payday: How Long Your Landlord Has to Return Your Deposit by State
TikTok & Reel Hooks: Scroll-Stopping Scripts for Tenants Fighting Back
The Security Deposit Dispute Letter That Actually Works
The 60-Second Fix: Generate Your Demand Letter at Deposits-Back.com for $19.99
key_points: Landlords cannot withhold security deposits for normal wear and tear; most states mandate return within 14 to 30 days and require itemized deductions
Problem-aware TikTok hooks stop the scroll by mirroring raw tenant frustration—e.g., 'POV: it’s day 31 and your landlord is ghosting you about your $2,000 deposit'
A formal demand letter is the fastest, most affordable way to recover withheld deposits before filing in small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates a state-specific, legally sound security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 with zero sign-up and zero subscription
output.cta: Stop waiting and start recovering. Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99. It takes 60 seconds, requires no sign-up, and puts the law on your side.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting security deposits and need immediate, affordable help
